case_title: OSTER MICKY VS MOGLEN LESLIE J

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OSTER MICKY AS TO DEFENDANT MOGLEN LESLIE J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOGLEN LESLIE J

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSTER MICKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOGLEN LESLIE J $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,036.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-17-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSTER MICKY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOGLEN LESLIE J PLAINTIFF UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF BY THE PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MOGLEN LESLIE J HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-24-1993, GRANTED
